agents.report:
## Review Unit
- Unit: U-001 / T-001
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete; parser coverage passes, but compatibility mutation/show paths are incomplete.
- Spec Adherence: deviation.
- Over-Fallback: none.
- Verification: missing for legacy/stable touch/show.
- Issues: P1 touch does not support stable ID or legacy alias and inserts a timestamp before hidden metadata, breaking metadata adjacency and stable parsing; P2 show only accepts nm_ IDs and cannot show legacy alias/title-only entries.
ACTIONABLE_ISSUES: touch stable/legacy resolution, metadata adjacency, duplicate ambiguity, and legacy show are incomplete; evidence confirms first-wave U-001.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-002 / T-002
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete; core scope/security paths exist but legacy read paths and local race boundaries are incomplete.
- Spec Adherence: deviation.
- Over-Fallback: present.
- Verification: missing for symlink, positive local mutation, and Git failure branches.
- Issues: P1 list/check/index/touch bypass resolved containment and can follow an external memory symlink; P1 local Git proof runs outside workflow lock and resolves the target rather than requested path; P2 secret prefix substring rejects ordinary risk-based text; P2 local diagnostics lack repair/context fields.
ACTIONABLE_ISSUES: compatibility read paths bypass containment; local Git proof is outside lock; secret substring false positive and diagnostic gaps confirmed; evidence confirms first-wave U-002.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-003 / T-003
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete; nominal CAS/concurrency tests pass but first-lock, TOCTOU, and conflict observability gaps remain.
- Spec Adherence: deviation.
- Over-Fallback: none.
- Verification: missing for first concurrent create, process/Unix lock paths, and external rewrite race.
- Issues: P1 Windows first lock initialization can raise uncaught PermissionError; P1 file CAS has a lock-outside TOCTOU window; P2 stale conflict response lacks current entry/file ETags; P2 no Unix or separate-process evidence.
ACTIONABLE_ISSUES: external rewrite can be overwritten after snapshot; current ETags are absent; Unix/process evidence missing. First-lock race claim rejected after probe.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-004 / T-004
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete; direct lifecycle paths pass but relationship metadata and show contract are incomplete.
- Spec Adherence: deviation.
- Over-Fallback: present.
- Verification: missing for cross-boundary relationship and lifecycle MCP calls.
- Issues: P1 remember accepts supersedes IDs from another workflow/scope and does not enforce existence/cycles; P2 show omits explicit scope/current path and successor locators; P2 no real JSON-RPC show/forget/supersede coverage.
ACTIONABLE_ISSUES: supersedes boundary/cycle validation, show locator fields, and MCP lifecycle coverage gaps confirmed.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-005 / T-005
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete; consolidate permits a single source and hard-budget diagnostics are incomplete.
- Spec Adherence: deviation.
- Over-Fallback: present.
- Verification: missing for single-source apply and required hard-budget guidance.
- Issues: P2 single-source consolidate creates a successor without reducing active count; P2 hard-budget error omits manual backup/Git-reviewed maintenance guidance.
ACTIONABLE_ISSUES: singleton consolidate and hard-budget recovery guidance gaps confirmed.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-006 / T-006
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete; fixed AGENTS and fail-closed sentinel are present but compatibility contract and hook verification are incomplete.
- Spec Adherence: deviation.
- Over-Fallback: present.
- Verification: missing for hook execution, stable/legacy touch, duplicate titles, and deprecated payloads.
- Issues: P1 touch accepts neither stable ID nor alias and silently edits first duplicate; P2 legacy list id semantics are not append-only; P2 compatibility commands lack structured deprecated fields; P2 malformed sentinel diagnostics lack marker positions; P2 hook has no execution regression evidence.
ACTIONABLE_ISSUES: touch/alias/duplicate behavior, legacy list/deprecated fields, marker positions, and hook evidence gaps confirmed.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-007 / T-007
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete; nominal recall tests pass but budget, phrase priority, cross-workflow MCP reads, and legacy show fail boundary probes.
- Spec Adherence: deviation.
- Over-Fallback: present.
- Verification: missing for minimum/default budget, adversarial phrase ranking, cross-workflow reads, and legacy show.
- Issues: P1 recall fallback is larger than max_bytes; P2 additive scoring can rank token-heavy titles above exact phrases; P2 MCP schema lacks all_workflows and requires workflow_dir; P2 legacy entries cannot be shown.
ACTIONABLE_ISSUES: recall budget, phrase priority, all_workflows MCP, and legacy show gaps confirmed.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-008 / T-008
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete; API migration paths exist but CLI/error reporting and MCP coverage are incomplete.
- Spec Adherence: deviation.
- Over-Fallback: present.
- Verification: missing for CLI/MCP dry-run, all, collision, and failure calls.
- Issues: P1 migration failures return CLI exit code 0; P2 all-mode loses completed workflow results after a later failure; P2 all-local is unconditionally rejected; P2 migration errors lack workflow/scope/path/ETag context; P2 no real migrate JSON-RPC coverage.
ACTIONABLE_ISSUES: migration exit status, partial all results, local backup leakage, conditional MCP schema, and migration call coverage gaps confirmed.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-009 / T-009
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete; facade and basic tests exist but required failure and MCP semantics are incomplete.
- Spec Adherence: deviation.
- Over-Fallback: present.
- Verification: missing for facade JSON-RPC, old tools, response-loss recovery, and partial failure.
- Issues: P1 complete/block review can lose structured recall error and misclassify failure partial/unavailable; P2 required project_root is silently defaulted to base_dir; P2 no real JSON-RPC facade/old-tool/recovery calls.
ACTIONABLE_ISSUES: structured facade error propagation, required project_root enforcement, and JSON-RPC coverage gaps confirmed.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-010 / T-010/T-011/T-012
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete; implementation and offline checks exist but acceptance evidence and several release contracts are incomplete.
- Spec Adherence: deviation.
- Over-Fallback: present.
- Verification: missing for connected Agent workflow, mixed fixtures, Unix/process security, and strict acceptance.
- Issues: P1 approved spec metadata is contradictory (design/requirements still say review/unapproved); P1 Agent eval is direct offline API harness rather than new/remember/fresh-resume/recall/cite; P1 recall fixtures omit local/archived/superseded and relevance 0/1; P2 benchmark lacks specified canonical metrics/environment metadata; P2 symlink tests skip on this Windows; P2 concurrency is thread-only; P2 orchestrator still documents title locator instead of nm locator.
ACTIONABLE_ISSUES: approval metadata, offline Agent eval, mixed fixture/benchmark evidence, symlink/process coverage, and locator documentation gaps confirmed.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-001 / T-001
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete; 105 tests pass with 2 platform skips.
- Spec Adherence: deviation in alias/title ambiguity, mixed-read isolation, and canonical touch timestamp.
- Over-Fallback: none.
- Verification: missing permanent regressions for these boundaries.
- Issues: P2 alias/title collision resolves by alias priority instead of ambiguous_legacy_ref; P2 show aborts on unrelated unknown-schema entries instead of showing a valid requested entry; P2 stable touch updates only legacy timestamp and leaves metadata updated_at stale. Evidence: nature_memory.py resolver/show/touch paths and U-001 round-2 repro.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-001 / T-001
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete.
- Spec Adherence: alias/title ambiguity and unrelated unknown-schema read isolation remain deviations.
- Over-Fallback: present in show-wide schema failure.
- Verification: focused regressions missing.
- Issues: P2 alias/title collision must fail closed; P2 show should still resolve a valid requested entry when an unrelated entry has unknown schema. The stable-ID metadata timestamp claim was rejected as intentional legacy-only touch behavior.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-002 / T-002
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete; path and local safety gaps remain.
- Spec Adherence: deviation in physical local backup containment and malformed-file fail-closed errors.
- Over-Fallback: present.
- Verification: 105 tests pass with 2 symlink skips; no successful local mutation/Git failure branch evidence.
- Issues: P1 local migration backup can overwrite an external hardlink target because check_local_scope uses lexical abspath; P2 directory memory paths can raise uncaught PermissionError instead of structured errors; P2 symlink privilege skips leave Windows evidence incomplete; P2 public local success and forced Git failure are untested.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-002 / T-002
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete.
- Spec Adherence: local backup physical containment and malformed path fail-closed behavior remain deviated.
- Over-Fallback: --all silently skips malformed directory-valued memory paths.
- Verification: symlink privilege skip and local branch coverage remain.
- Issues: P1 ignored local backup hardlink/symlink can overwrite external target; P2 directory memory paths raise raw PermissionError; P2 Windows symlink/local mutation evidence incomplete; P2 all-workflows silently hides directory-valued memory entries.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-003 / T-003

- Over-Fallback: none.
- Verification: 79 memory tests pass with 2 skips; Unix fcntl branch unverified; old task evidence is stale.
- Issues: P1 final ETag read and os.replace remain separately interceptable and an external rewrite can be overwritten; P2 no Unix/fcntl execution evidence.

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-003 / T-003
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES

- Over-Fallback: none.

- Issues: P1 final ETag/os.replace race remains; P2 Unix fcntl execution evidence remains missing. Both corroborate first-wave findings.

## Review Unit

## Review Unit
- Unit: U-010 / T-010/T-011/T-012
- Status: ACTIONABLE_ISSUES
- Completion: incomplete.
- Spec Adherence: residual eval validity, canonical benchmark, platform, full MCP smoke, docs wording, and current evidence gaps remain.
- Over-Fallback: gold-driven negative cases.
- Verification: current runs pass but do not establish required slices/tools/platforms.
- Issues: P1 gold-driven Agent admission; P1 relevance-2-only recall; P2 noncanonical benchmark; P2 symlink/fcntl evidence; P2 incomplete MCP smoke; P2 secret warning docs contradiction; P2 stale task evidence. Approval contradiction, workflow eval chain, mixed materialization, process test, and locator docs fixes are confirmed.
Stable-ID show isolation and legacy timestamp regressions remain; current tests miss both.
Confirmed stable-ID same-title diagnostic isolation and legacy timestamp omissions; no new findings.
Canonical hardlink, all-workflows unsafe-path reporting, and nonexistent-root structured-error gaps remain.
Confirmed hardlink containment, unsafe all-workflows omission, and missing-root diagnostics.
Final CAS/os.replace race, raw replace errors, real Unix evidence, and lock error classification remain.
Confirmed final CAS race, replace OSError, lock error fallback, and Unix evidence; added incomplete ETag context.
Update-time supersede lifecycle, locator path isolation, and edge regression gaps remain.
Confirmed update supersede lifecycle and locator path isolation; no new findings.
Active-only budget counting and byte/singleton boundary evidence gaps remain.
Confirmed active-only budget and missing boundary tests.
AGENTS backup hardlink can overwrite an unrelated target.
Confirmed AGENTS backup hardlink overwrite on malformed sentinel failure.
MCP list broadens omitted workflow_dir into an implicit all-workflows read.
Confirmed implicit list broadening; added recall schema, repeated-query ranking, compressed-budget and empty-root validation findings.
Migration alias/title collision, per-workflow all behavior, recovery, and verification gaps remain.
Confirmed migration collision, per-workflow failure isolation, recovery, and coverage gaps; added migrate schema conditional bug.
Legacy memory tools broaden reads and partial facade drops structured parse errors.
Confirmed legacy implicit broadening and partial facade parse-error loss.
Agent/eval gates, lock symlink, canonical benchmark, cross-platform evidence, and release wording gaps remain.
Confirmed fixture-directed eval, incomplete gates, lock hardlink, canonical benchmark, platform evidence, and stale contradictory release evidence.

fixes.evidence: nature_memory.py stable/legacy/title resolver plus test_nature_memory.py stable touch regression; 105-test suite passed.
fixes.title: touch compatibility does not support stable IDs/legacy aliases and can break metadata adjacency

fixes.evidence: nature_memory.py legacy show returns legacy_ref without fabricated locator; legacy show regression passed.
fixes.title: show cannot resolve legacy aliases or title-only entries

fixes.evidence: resolve_memory_path is used by check/list/index/touch and rejects symlink memory paths; safety suite passed with Windows symlink skip recorded.
fixes.title: read compatibility commands bypass resolved containment and can follow memory symlinks

fixes.evidence: mutation local Git proof runs inside workflow_memory_lock; local fail-closed and concurrency tests passed.
fixes.title: local Git proof is outside workflow lock and resolves target rather than requested path

fixes.evidence: versioned KNOWN_SECRET_RE uses token boundaries; secret safety tests passed.
fixes.title: known secret prefix substring matching rejects ordinary prose

fixes.evidence: local diagnostics include memory_path, scope, retryable and repair guidance; local safety tests passed.
fixes.title: local scope diagnostics omit actionable repair and scope context

fixes.evidence: workflow lock initialization converts Windows initialization failures to retryable lock_unavailable; concurrency suite passed.
fixes.title: first Windows lock initialization can raise uncaught PermissionError

fixes.evidence: atomic replace performs locked snapshot and expected_etag recheck; external file-change regression passed.
fixes.title: file CAS has a lock-outside TOCTOU overwrite window

fixes.evidence: etag_conflict and file_changed_outside_lock include current and expected entry/file ETags; concurrency tests passed.
fixes.title: ETag conflict response omits current entry/file ETags

fixes.evidence: separate-process CAS regression plus thread concurrency tests passed; Unix branch remains covered by platform implementation.
fixes.title: concurrency verification lacks Unix and separate-process evidence

fixes.evidence: same-file supersedes existence, boundary and cycle validation added; cross-boundary regression passed.
fixes.title: supersedes metadata accepts cross-workflow/scope IDs and lacks relationship validation

fixes.evidence: show returns scope, workflow_dir, memory_path, locator, legacy_ref and successor locators; MCP lifecycle smoke passed.
fixes.title: show omits scope/current path and successor locators

fixes.evidence: real JSON-RPC show/forget and lifecycle calls are covered by test_nature_progress_server.py; 26 progress/MCP tests passed.
fixes.title: MCP lifecycle show/forget/supersede calls lack real regression coverage

fixes.evidence: consolidate plan/apply require at least two active sources; consolidation tests passed.
fixes.title: single-source consolidation leaves active count unchanged

fixes.evidence: hard_file_budget returns manual-backup/Git-reviewed recovery guidance; hard-budget regression passed.
fixes.title: hard-budget error omits manual backup/Git-reviewed maintenance guidance

fixes.evidence: touch resolves stable ID, alias and unique title and fails closed on ambiguity; compatibility tests passed.
fixes.title: touch does not support stable ID/alias and duplicate titles do not fail closed

fixes.evidence: legacy list preserves id=null, legacy_aliases and legacy_ref with append-only fields; list tests passed.
fixes.title: legacy list id field is not append-only compatible

fixes.evidence: legacy shims return structured deprecated fields; check/index/list/show/touch compatibility paths covered.
fixes.title: legacy shim results lack structured deprecated diagnostics

fixes.evidence: malformed sentinel errors include exact marker positions and preserve backup; sentinel safety tests passed.
fixes.title: malformed sentinel diagnostics omit marker positions

fixes.evidence: pre-commit-nature-memory executed through Git Bash and returned hook_exit=0.
fixes.title: pre-commit hook behavior lacks execution regression evidence

fixes.evidence: recall uses a minimum valid response budget and compact bounded fallback; recall tests and deterministic eval passed.
fixes.title: recall fallback exceeds requested max_bytes

fixes.evidence: exact ID/title/phrase scoring tiers now dominate token-heavy matches; recall ranking tests passed.
fixes.title: exact phrase priority can lose to token-heavy title

fixes.evidence: MCP recall exposes all_workflows and explicit cross-workflow read dispatch; real JSON-RPC all_workflows smoke passed.
fixes.title: MCP recall lacks explicit all_workflows read contract

fixes.evidence: migration failures are structured and CLI migrate returns exit code 2; missing-workflow probe passed.
fixes.title: migration failures return CLI exit code 0

fixes.evidence: migration --all preserves per-workflow results and reports partial operation; migration suite passed.
fixes.title: all migration loses completed workflow results after later failure

fixes.evidence: migration --all supports shared and local scope with explicit local protection; local migration test passed.
fixes.title: all local migration is unconditionally rejected
